titleStmt.title: SII 29.179: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 179. (A.R. No. B. 827 of 1962-63.) SIRWĀR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a boulder at the foot of the hill.

It refers to an arrangement samaya-sthiti made by the two-hundred mahājana of Śrīvūra for the regular payment of taxes such as vīsaka, dasaka and pañchaka. It stipulates that though vīsaka and dasaka can be divided in terms of five, pañchaka should not be divided. If done one has to pay three times the value [of paṇa] assessed as tax. It states that if the system is damaged it is dangerous to the [good of the] village.
This record in characters of about the 10th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śrī vuradiṟnūrbbar māḍida samaya sthiti
vīsaka-dasaka-pañcaka pañcakadoḷādudendu hāni
vriddhi pañcaka vaneyduvudu pañcakanteṟa tolage
daśaka vaneyduvudu daśakanteṟa tolage vīsakava neydugu pañcaka voḍeya salla
vīsakanteṟa tolage Ūraneyduvudu Intavu tolage
Ūraḻiya tetta kūḻu paṇavuntri guṇa Āpāda samayadoḷtri guṇavanikki puguvo
Ī sthitiya naḻidāta svānagāḷdābha caṇḍāḷaṁ pemi meḻtu peṇḍirddā gapilla .
Digital edition of SII 29.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
